steps.title: Distribute 7xy across the parentheses
steps.content:
$$7xy \cdot 2x^2 = 14 x^{3} y$$
$$7xy \cdot 8y = 56 x y^{2}$$
Adding the products gives $$14x^{3}y + 56xy^{2}$$.

steps.title: Match result to choices
steps.content:
The result $$14x^{3}y + 56xy^{2}$$ matches choice D: $$14x^{3}y + 56xy^{2}$$.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
